title: 財商照妖鏡｜老和尚二選一

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The old monk asks: You just got paid. Which choice pays your future self first?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：徒兒剛領薪水，哪個選擇是在先支付未來的自己？

choices.en: Spend it all on a luxury watch to impress people you do not even like.
choices.zh: 全拿去買名牌錶，給那些你根本不喜歡的人看。

choices.en: Pay yourself first by putting 20% into your investment system.
choices.zh: 先把20%放進投資系統，默默付給未來的自己。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，你選擇讓錢開始替你工作。｜財商金句：被動收入能在你睡覺時，還在幫你賺錢。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Passive income makes money for you while you sleep.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 徒兒，名牌錶很亮，但錢包會先暗下去。｜回到金句：被動收入能在你睡覺時，還在幫你賺錢。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Passive income makes money for you while you sleep.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Passive income makes money for you while you sleep.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 被動收入能在你睡覺時，還在幫你賺錢。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What happens to active income when you stop working?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：如果你停止工作，主動收入會怎樣？

choices.en: It keeps growing because the boss misses you.
choices.zh: 它會繼續成長，因為老闆太想念你。

choices.en: Active income stops when you stop working.
choices.zh: 當你停止工作，主動收入就停了。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，這就是只靠薪水的危險。｜財商金句：當你停止工作，主動收入就停了。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Active income stops when you stop working.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這個想法很浪漫，但薪資單通常不浪漫。｜回到金句：當你停止工作，主動收入就停了。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Active income stops when you stop working.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Active income stops when you stop working.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 當你停止工作，主動收入就停了。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What are rich people usually building?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：有錢人通常在打造什麼？

choices.en: Money-making systems that work even when they are not there.
choices.zh: 打造就算自己不在也能運轉的賺錢系統。

choices.en: A bigger overtime schedule to prove loyalty.
choices.zh: 排更多加班，證明自己忠誠。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，系統比情緒更可靠。｜財商金句：有錢人專注於打造會賺錢的系統。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Rich people focus on building money-making systems.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 徒兒，忠誠很好，但加班不能當資產。｜回到金句：有錢人專注於打造會賺錢的系統。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Rich people focus on building money-making systems.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Rich people focus on building money-making systems.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 有錢人專注於打造會賺錢的系統。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Why do many people feel trapped by work?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：很多人為何覺得被工作困住？

choices.en: They trade limited time for money forever.
choices.zh: 他們一直用有限時間去換錢。

choices.en: They forgot to buy a more expensive coffee.
choices.zh: 因為忘記買更貴的咖啡。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，時間有限，所以要想辦法讓錢也上班。｜財商金句：我厭倦了用有限的時間去換取金錢。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. I am tired of trading my limited time for money.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 咖啡能提神，但不能替你付房租。｜回到金句：我厭倦了用有限的時間去換取金錢。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. I am tired of trading my limited time for money.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: I am tired of trading my limited time for money.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 我厭倦了用有限的時間去換取金錢。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Where does financial intelligence begin?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：財商的起點在哪裡？

choices.en: Changing your mindset before changing your handbag.
choices.zh: 先改變思維，再考慮換包包。

choices.en: Waiting for a lottery ticket to understand your pain.
choices.zh: 等彩券理解你的痛苦。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，財商先從腦袋升級。｜財商金句：財商的起點，是從改變思維模式開始。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Financial intelligence starts with changing your mindset.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 彩券聽不到你的痛苦，帳單聽得到。｜回到金句：財商的起點，是從改變思維模式開始。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Financial intelligence starts with changing your mindset.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Financial intelligence starts with changing your mindset.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 財商的起點，是從改變思維模式開始。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Which one is an asset?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：哪一個才像資產？

choices.en: Something that puts money into your pocket.
choices.zh: 會把錢放進你口袋的東西。

choices.en: Something that makes your friends jealous but empties your wallet.
choices.zh: 讓朋友羨慕、但讓錢包變薄的東西。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，資產重點是現金流。｜財商金句：資產是把錢放進你的口袋。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. An asset puts money into your pocket.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 徒兒，羨慕不是收入。｜回到金句：資產是把錢放進你的口袋。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. An asset puts money into your pocket.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: An asset puts money into your pocket.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 資產是把錢放進你的口袋。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Which one is a liability?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：哪一個比較像負債？

choices.en: A thing that takes money out of your pocket every month.
choices.zh: 每個月都把錢從你口袋拿走的東西。

choices.en: A thing that pays you while you sleep.
choices.zh: 你睡覺時還會付錢給你的東西。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，你看見錢流出去的方向。｜財商金句：負債是把錢從你的口袋拿走。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. A liability takes money out of your pocket.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 如果它會付錢給你，就不要冤枉它。｜回到金句：負債是把錢從你的口袋拿走。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. A liability takes money out of your pocket.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: A liability takes money out of your pocket.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 負債是把錢從你的口袋拿走。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What happens to a new luxury car?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：新買的豪華車通常會怎樣？

choices.en: It depreciates every day while you admire the logo.
choices.zh: 你欣賞車標時，它每天都在折舊。

choices.en: It becomes a money tree because the seats are leather.
choices.zh: 因為座椅是真皮，所以變成搖錢樹。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，車可以是需求，但不要幻想它自動變資產。｜財商金句：那輛豪華汽車每天都在折舊貶值。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. That luxury car is depreciating every day.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 真皮座椅舒服，但不會自己吐鈔票。｜回到金句：那輛豪華汽車每天都在折舊貶值。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. That luxury car is depreciating every day.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: That luxury car is depreciating every day.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 那輛豪華汽車每天都在折舊貶值。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What makes people beautifully poor?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：什麼最容易讓人變成精緻窮？

choices.en: Buying things to impress others.
choices.zh: 為了給別人看而買東西。

choices.en: Buying true assets before buying luxury.
choices.zh: 先買真正的資產，再考慮奢侈品。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，面子很貴，而且不配息。｜財商金句：為了給別人看而買東西，只會讓你變窮。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Buying things to impress others makes you poor.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 徒兒，這個選項才是財商路線。｜回到金句：為了給別人看而買東西，只會讓你變窮。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Buying things to impress others makes you poor.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Buying things to impress others makes you poor.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 為了給別人看而買東西，只會讓你變窮。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Before luxury, what should come first?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：在買奢侈品之前，什麼應該先來？

choices.en: True assets that can help you earn.
choices.zh: 能幫你賺錢的真正資產。

choices.en: A louder logo so strangers know you tried hard.
choices.zh: 更大的Logo，讓陌生人知道你很努力。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，先有底氣，再有品味。｜財商金句：我要在買奢侈品之前，先購買真正的資產。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. I want to buy true assets before buying luxury.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: Logo很大聲，但資產負債表更誠實。｜回到金句：我要在買奢侈品之前，先購買真正的資產。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. I want to buy true assets before buying luxury.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: I want to buy true assets before buying luxury.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 我要在買奢侈品之前，先購買真正的資產。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Is saving all cash in the bank always safe?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：把所有現金都放銀行一定安全嗎？

choices.en: No. It is risky if inflation keeps eating purchasing power.
choices.zh: 不一定，若通膨持續吞購買力，其實有風險。

choices.en: Yes. The bank balance will scare inflation away.
choices.zh: 一定安全，銀行餘額會把通膨嚇跑。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，安全不只看數字，也看購買力。｜財商金句：把所有現金都存在銀行裡其實是有風險的。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Saving all your cash in the bank is risky.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 通膨不怕餘額，它怕的是你有策略。｜回到金句：把所有現金都存在銀行裡其實是有風險的。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Saving all your cash in the bank is risky.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Saving all your cash in the bank is risky.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 把所有現金都存在銀行裡其實是有風險的。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What is inflation doing quietly?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：通膨正在偷偷做什麼？

choices.en: Eating away your purchasing power while you sleep.
choices.zh: 在你睡覺時慢慢吞掉購買力。

choices.en: Sending you a polite apology letter every month.
choices.zh: 每個月寄一封道歉信給你。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，通膨安靜，但下手很重。｜財商金句：通貨膨脹正在吞噬我的購買力。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Inflation is eating away my purchasing power.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 它不會道歉，只會漲價。｜回到金句：通貨膨脹正在吞噬我的購買力。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Inflation is eating away my purchasing power.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Inflation is eating away my purchasing power.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 通貨膨脹正在吞噬我的購買力。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: When prices rise fast, what should you notice?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：物價快速上漲時，你該注意什麼？

choices.en: Your money buys less than before.
choices.zh: 你的錢買得到的東西變少了。

choices.en: Your wallet has become emotionally stronger.
choices.zh: 你的錢包情緒變堅強了。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，財商看的是購買力。｜財商金句：每樣東西的價格都在飛快上漲。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. The price of everything is rising fast.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 錢包很堅強，但帳單更堅強。｜回到金句：每樣東西的價格都在飛快上漲。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. The price of everything is rising fast.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: The price of everything is rising fast.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 每樣東西的價格都在飛快上漲。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What happens to cash that stays stagnant?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：現金一直不動會怎樣？

choices.en: It may become trash in terms of purchasing power.
choices.zh: 從購買力角度看，可能慢慢變垃圾。

choices.en: It becomes a wise old monk by itself.
choices.zh: 它自己會變成有智慧的老和尚。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，現金要有用途，不是永遠睡覺。｜財商金句：現金如果放著不動，最後可能變成垃圾。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Cash becomes trash if it stays stagnant.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 現金不會開悟，只會被通膨敲木魚。｜回到金句：現金如果放著不動，最後可能變成垃圾。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Cash becomes trash if it stays stagnant.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Cash becomes trash if it stays stagnant.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 現金如果放著不動，最後可能變成垃圾。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What kind of investment do you need?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：你需要什麼樣的投資？

choices.en: Investments that can beat the inflation rate.
choices.zh: 能跑贏通膨率的投資。

choices.en: Investments recommended by the loudest neighbor.
choices.zh: 隔壁最大聲的人推薦的投資。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，目標是跑贏通膨，不是跑贏鄰居音量。｜財商金句：我需要能跑贏通膨率的投資工具。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. I need investments that beat the inflation rate.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 聲音大不代表報酬高。｜回到金句：我需要能跑贏通膨率的投資工具。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. I need investments that beat the inflation rate.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: I need investments that beat the inflation rate.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 我需要能跑贏通膨率的投資工具。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: How do you find where your money leaks?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：怎麼知道錢從哪裡漏掉？

choices.en: Track your expenses every day.
choices.zh: 每天追蹤、記錄花銷。

choices.en: Close your eyes and trust your wallet.
choices.zh: 閉上眼睛，相信錢包自己會反省。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，記帳是照妖鏡。｜財商金句：我必須每天追蹤、記錄我的花銷。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. I must track my expenses every day.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 錢包不會反省，你要看帳。｜回到金句：我必須每天追蹤、記錄我的花銷。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. I must track my expenses every day.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: I must track my expenses every day.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 我必須每天追蹤、記錄我的花銷。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What should you do before spending?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：花錢之前該先做什麼？

choices.en: Pay yourself first.
choices.zh: 先付給自己。

choices.en: Pay every shopping app first.
choices.zh: 先孝敬每個購物App。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，先存再花，才不會只剩空氣。｜財商金句：在花任何錢之前，先存錢付給自己。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Pay yourself first before spending any money.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 購物App很會笑，你的未來會哭。｜回到金句：在花任何錢之前，先存錢付給自己。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Pay yourself first before spending any money.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Pay yourself first before spending any money.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 在花任何錢之前，先存錢付給自己。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Are small expenses harmless?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：小錢真的沒差嗎？

choices.en: No. Small expenses can add up to a huge leak.
choices.zh: 不是，小錢累積也會變成大漏洞。

choices.en: Yes. Small money is too shy to hurt you.
choices.zh: 是的，小錢太害羞，不會傷害你。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，小漏不補，月底吃土。｜財商金句：小錢累積起來，也會變成巨大的財務漏洞。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Small expenses add up to a huge leak.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 小錢不害羞，它只是很會集合。｜回到金句：小錢累積起來，也會變成巨大的財務漏洞。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Small expenses add up to a huge leak.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Small expenses add up to a huge leak.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 小錢累積起來，也會變成巨大的財務漏洞。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Why do you need capital?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：為什麼要有第一桶金？

choices.en: Without capital, you cannot play the investment game.
choices.zh: 沒有本金，就很難進入投資遊戲。

choices.en: Because screenshots of wealth quotes need decoration.
choices.zh: 因為財商語錄截圖需要裝飾。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，先有本金，才有上場資格。｜財商金句：沒有第一桶金，你很難玩投資遊戲。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Without capital, you cannot play the investment game.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 語錄很好看，但本金比較實用。｜回到金句：沒有第一桶金，你很難玩投資遊戲。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Without capital, you cannot play the investment game.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Without capital, you cannot play the investment game.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 沒有第一桶金，你很難玩投資遊戲。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: What is the foundation of wealth building?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：累積財富的基礎是什麼？

choices.en: Discipline.
choices.zh: 紀律。

choices.en: Mood. Spend only when the moon feels right.
choices.zh: 心情。月亮對了才花錢。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，紀律不性感，但很有用。｜財商金句：紀律是累積財富最根本的基石。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Discipline is the foundation of wealth building.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 看月亮很浪漫，看帳戶比較現實。｜回到金句：紀律是累積財富最根本的基石。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Discipline is the foundation of wealth building.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Discipline is the foundation of wealth building.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 紀律是累積財富最根本的基石。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Why do you need a financial defense?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：為什麼要先建立財務防禦？

choices.en: Life is full of unexpected emergencies.
choices.zh: 人生充滿突發狀況。

choices.en: Because emergencies will wait until you feel ready.
choices.zh: 因為突發狀況會等你準備好才來。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，風險不會先預約。｜財商金句：人生充滿了意想不到的突發緊急狀況。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Life is full of unexpected emergencies.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 突發狀況最不講武德。｜回到金句：人生充滿了意想不到的突發緊急狀況。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Life is full of unexpected emergencies.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Life is full of unexpected emergencies.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 人生充滿了意想不到的突發緊急狀況。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: How much cash cushion is a good start?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：現金預備金至少可以先抓多少？

choices.en: Six months of living expenses.
choices.zh: 六個月生活費。

choices.en: Six months of motivational quotes.
choices.zh: 六個月的勵志語錄。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，預備金讓你在市場亂時還能吃飯。｜財商金句：我需要準備六個月的生活費作為現金預備金。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. I need six months of living expenses in cash.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 語錄不能繳房租。｜回到金句：我需要準備六個月的生活費作為現金預備金。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. I need six months of living expenses in cash.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: I need six months of living expenses in cash.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 我需要準備六個月的生活費作為現金預備金。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Can you invest your emergency fund?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：可以拿緊急預備金去投資嗎？

choices.en: No. Never touch it for investing.
choices.zh: 不行，不能拿去當投資本金。

choices.en: Yes. Emergencies should learn to be patient.
choices.zh: 可以，緊急狀況應該學會等待。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，預備金是防彈衣，不是賭桌籌碼。｜財商金句：絕不能把緊急預備金拿去當作投資本金。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Never touch your emergency fund for investing.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 急用錢時，市場不一定給你面子。｜回到金句：絕不能把緊急預備金拿去當作投資本金。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Never touch your emergency fund for investing.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Never touch your emergency fund for investing.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 絕不能把緊急預備金拿去當作投資本金。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Why does insurance matter?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：保險的重點是什麼？

choices.en: It protects your family from financial disaster.
choices.zh: 保護家人免於財務災難。

choices.en: It makes you look mature in family group chats.
choices.zh: 讓你在家族群組看起來比較成熟。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 很好，保險不是炫耀，是風險轉移。｜財商金句：保險能保護我的家庭免於財務災難。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Insurance protects my family from financial disaster.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 成熟不是貼保單，是懂風險。｜回到金句：保險能保護我的家庭免於財務災難。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Insurance protects my family from financial disaster.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Insurance protects my family from financial disaster.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 保險能保護我的家庭免於財務災難。

questions.title: 財商問答宇宙
questions.en: The monk asks: Before investing aggressively, what comes first?
questions.zh: 老和尚問：開始積極投資前，要先做什麼？

choices.en: Build your defense first.
choices.zh: 先建好防禦。

choices.en: Attack first and hope life respects your courage.
choices.zh: 先進攻，期待人生尊重你的勇氣。

questions.correct_reply_zh: 對，先活下來，才有資格長期複利。｜財商金句：在開始進攻之前，先建好你的防禦。
questions.correct_reply_en: Good. Build your defense before you start your offense.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 勇氣很好，但風險管理更長壽。｜回到金句：在開始進攻之前，先建好你的防禦。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Careful. Build your defense before you start your offense.
questions.quiz_prompt_zh: 二選一：哪個選擇比較有財商？
questions.quiz_prompt_en: Choose one: Which choice shows better financial intelligence?
questions.finance_quote_en: Build your defense before you start your offense.
questions.finance_quote_zh: 在開始進攻之前，先建好你的防禦。
